nodes.label: Repository Instruction Precedence
nodes.source_location: Instruction precedence and sources of truth
nodes.rationale: Durable repository policy and authoritative source documents outrank chat history and third-party tool output.

nodes.label: Regulated Control-plane Invariants
nodes.rationale: Durable internal business truth, adapter isolation, distinct finalities, exact amounts, stable identities, and inquiry-before-resubmission prevent unsafe financial shortcuts.

nodes.label: Exact Quantity and Idempotency Rules
nodes.source_location: Exact money, token quantity, and idempotency rules

nodes.label: Architectural Thesis
nodes.rationale: Java owns the control plane, durable workflow owns business truth, adapters isolate native technology, and ambiguous submission requires evidence-led inquiry.

nodes.label: Non-production Security Boundary
nodes.rationale: The reference implementation is not approved for real funds, public networks, production signers, or compliance reliance.

nodes.label: Pending Outbox Is Not Execution
nodes.rationale: A pending local outbox record proves durable acceptance only, not processing or any external effect.

nodes.label: HTTP 202 Durable Acceptance Semantics
nodes.rationale: HTTP 202 means the local acceptance transaction committed and explicitly does not claim signing, submission, minting, burning, reconciliation, settlement, or another external effect.

nodes.label: Durable Internal Business Truth
nodes.rationale: Native evidence informs durable internal operation, policy, authorization, ledger, finality, and reconciliation state but does not replace it.

nodes.label: Ambiguous Submission Recovery
nodes.rationale: Ambiguity is not failure; inquiry, independent evidence, expiry conditions, and explicit policy must precede any new attempt.

nodes.label: Active Durable API and Persistence Phase
nodes.norm_label: active durable api and persistence phase

nodes.label: ADR 0001 Maven Reactor and Module Boundaries
nodes.norm_label: adr 0001 maven reactor and module boundaries

nodes.label: No Speculative Adapter Modules
nodes.rationale: Adapter modules are created only when a vertical slice uses and tests them, avoiding speculative structure.

nodes.label: ADR 0004 PostgreSQL JDBC Flyway Atomic Outbox
nodes.norm_label: adr 0004 postgresql jdbc flyway atomic outbox

nodes.label: Outbox Worker Deferred to Phase 3B
nodes.rationale: A durable pending outbox record preserves atomic intent while polling, leasing, publication, retry, and recovery remain a later phase.

nodes.label: Accepted ADR Lifecycle
nodes.rationale: Accepted records govern current decisions; supersession requires a new ADR so historical rationale is not rewritten.

nodes.label: Phase 3A Durable API and Persistence Plan
nodes.norm_label: phase 3a durable api and persistence plan

nodes.label: Dependency and Binary Boundary Evidence
nodes.source_location: Evidence log: Dependencies and binary boundaries

nodes.label: Runtime Configuration and Static Gate Evidence
nodes.norm_label: runtime configuration and static gate evidence

nodes.label: Phase 3B Processing Deferral
nodes.rationale: Durable acceptance deliberately records one pending outbox event without polling, publication, processing, signing, chain submission, or another external effect; those recovery mechanics require their own Phase 3B gate.
